message:
test(oracle): add 11 more conformance test suites (288 total)

New suites: between_edge_cases, self_join, having_case_and_agg,
update_complex_set, expr_eval_edges, aggregate_edges, cast_operations,
recursive_cte_fib_str, join_affinity, where_in_complex, alias_resolution.

All 288 conformance oracle tests pass with 0 mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
